definitions.translation: to increase effort or improve performance

examples.no: toget fikk opp dampen etter noen kilometer
examples.en: the train picked up steam after a few kilometers

examples.no: de fikk opp dampen halvveis i kampen
examples.en: they picked up steam halfway through the match

examples.no: få opp dampen etter en dårlig start
examples.en: pick up steam after a poor start
